problem.description: Phase 47 and 48 task files contain wrong implementation paths — they reference the production/installed locations (~/.claude/viepilot/workflows/, ~/.claude/skills/) instead of the source codebase paths (workflows/, skills/) relative to the repo root.

hypotheses.description: vp-evolve planning used ~/.claude paths (production install) instead of source repo paths because the vp-audit scan referenced the installed files

findings: Correct pattern (from Phase 46): paths are relative to repo root — 'workflows/brainstorm.md', 'skills/vp-brainstorm/SKILL.md'
Phase 47-48 tasks incorrectly used absolute installed paths starting with ~/.claude/

resolution.root_cause: During vp-evolve planning, the audit results referenced installed paths (~/.claude/viepilot/workflows/, ~/.claude/skills/) and those were carried directly into task Paths blocks instead of being converted to source repo-relative paths.
resolution.fix_applied: Rewrote all 12 affected task files to use source repo-relative paths (workflows/, skills/, templates/).
resolution.verification: Compare with Phase 46 task pattern: all paths now use repo-relative format matching existing convention
